title: erigeron mihianus
intro: Erigeron mihianus, also known as Miah's fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erigeron mihianus are said to include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Erigeron mihianus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its flowers can also be used as a garnish in salads or as a culinary ingredient.
